_comment: Weekly snapshots of the OPEN CommitFest, used to compute week-over-week deltas. One object per ISO week (Monday date). Populated by the weekly-dbms-digest skill from the per-CF activity log.

weeks.note: First tracked week (baseline). Flow computed from the per-CF activity log /59/activity/; absolute total not captured (full list page skipped to save tokens). Week-over-week total deltas begin next run.

created.title: Fix PL/Python crash when a SRF is redefined mid-execution
pg_dump: skip pg_init_privs entries for non-existent roles
Fix out of bound access on embedded null token
Tighten pg_uhc_verifychar() to enforce CP949 lead/trail byte ranges

closed.title: Fix PL/Python crash when a SRF is redefined mid-execution
Fix pg_restore --no-globals SQL output for pg_dumpall archives

weeks.note_window: Activity log covered Jun 18-21 in the page fetched; earlier in-window days (Jun 15-17) not enumerated this run.

weeks.note: Regenerated 2026-06-29 via the in-browser fetch path (Claude-in-Chrome + same-origin fetch of /59/activity/ and /59/), after a full rescan. Earlier same-day run could not reach the CF app (GitHub-only egress) and is superseded. Flow below is the verified Jun 22-28 window from the activity log. Queue totals read from the filter sidebar and treated as approximate, not a precise snapshot.

created.title: Reduce reorder buffer spill from O(N^2) to O(N) during vacuum storms
plpython: NULL pointer dereference on broken sequence objects
ON EMPTY clause for aggregate and window functions
Add hook for plugins to acquire sample rows during ANALYZE
Document COPY FROM WHERE restrictions on generated and system columns

closed.title: BUG #19484: Segmentation fault triggered by FDW
Fix bug of CHECK constraint enforceability recursion
Protect against timestamp underflow in uuidv7(interval)
pgbench --continue-on-error: clarify TPS and failure reporting

weeks.net: in-window: 4 committed, 2 withdrawn; multiple new records (UUID cluster, reorder-buffer perf, ANALYZE sampling hook, new GUC/aggregate proposals)
weeks.note_window: Activity log fully covered Jun 22-28 (and into Jun 29) this run.
